headline: S&P Unveils Blockchain Index for 20 Digital Assets

article.title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
article.summary: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.

headline: $1M Crypto PAC Injects Funds into Michigan Primary

article.title: Crypto PAC pours $1M into Michigan Democratic primary race
article.summary: Donavan McKinney, running against Michigan incumbent Shri Thanedar, said that “the crypto lobby is paying my opponent back for helping Trump“ with the PAC-funded ads.

headline: Asia Stocks Jump 2% on Chipmaker Rally

article.title: Asian Shares Rise as Chipmakers Gain, Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Asian shares advanced as regional chipmakers gained on expectations they will benefit from billions of dollars flowing into the artificial intelligence buildout. Oil extended its recent gains.

headline: Mexico Stocks Plummet 2% After Mayor Assassination

article.title: Mexican Mayor Shot Dead in his Office After Surviving Earlier Hit
article.summary: Armed assailants gunned down the mayor of a small Mexican city just south of the country’s capital in his office in the latest case of suspected gangland violence targeting a local official.

headline: Coinbase Expands to Canada with $1B Investment

article.title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
article.summary: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

headline: Kraken Expands 200x Global Stocks to Crypto Platform

article.summary: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

article.summary: Latest Clarity Act draft is drawing praise from the crypto industry and criticism from Democrats and bankers, highlighting deep divisions.

article.summary: On Wednesday, the Clarity Act took one step closer to becoming law as Republicans released the latest text for the legislation.

headline: Alphabet Burns $6B in Cash Amid AI Push
